{{Quote|These powerful Dark Siders made a last stand on the planet Corbos against Jedi Hunters and powerful Dark Side rivals. We know this ended the Hundred-Year Darkness.|[[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok III]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 30" />}}
The '''Battle of Corbos''', also called the '''Rout of Corbos''', was a battle fought between the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. It was the last battle of the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]].

==The battle==
Having fought for nearly a century, the Jedi and their rival Dark Jedi made a final stand at [[Corbos]], a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world. [[Ajunta Pall]],<ref name="JvS" /> the leader of the Dark Jedi,<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=codex|Tomb of Ajunta Pall}}</ref> personally slew more than a dozen Jedi before the Dark Jedi were defeated at the battle's end.<ref name="JvS" /> [[Karness Muur]] also participated in the battle and was one of the few surviving Dark Jedi.<ref name="Legacy (2006) 30" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The surviving Dark Siders fled the Republic, finally coming to Korriban where the native Sith welcomed them as gods.|Darth Wyyrlok III|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 30" />}}
The [[Exiles|surviving Dark Jedi]] were exiled to uncharted space, where they [[Discovery of Korriban|discovered]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], home to the primitive but unusually Force-sensitive [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] people. Using their training in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], the fallen Jedi amazed the Sith<ref name="JvS" /> and elevated themselves to god-like status<ref name="TOTJ2">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]]</ref> on Korriban and [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]], becoming the rulers of the Sith people.<ref name="JvS" /> As years passed, and interbreeding occurred between the Fallen Jedi and the Sith, the term "[[Sith/Legends|Sith]]" came to mean not only the original inhabitants of Ziost and Korriban, but also their fallen Jedi masters.<ref name="TOTJ2" />
